issue.title: 脚本层迁移到 Go CLI

commands: python3 -m py_compile src/bigclaw/legacy_shim.py scripts/ops/bigclaw_github_sync.py scripts/ops/bigclaw_refill_queue.py scripts/ops/bigclaw_workspace_bootstrap.py scripts/ops/symphony_workspace_bootstrap.py scripts/ops/symphony_workspace_validate.py scripts/create_issues.py scripts/dev_smoke.py
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation e2e run-task-smoke --help
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation benchmark soak-local --help
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation migration shadow-compare --help

blocker.summary: No blocking repo action remains. PR #215 is open; only GitHub compare rendering still appears stale/erroring for the latest branch state.

external_verification.notes: Authenticated GitHub API creation succeeded for PR #215. The compare page remains reachable but diff generation is still incomplete in-browser, emits repeated 'Uh oh!' load failures, and the rendered compare summary still appears stale, showing only 14 commits and 26 files changed instead of the latest branch tip.
